// Negative: a top-level class Report declared in this file shadows the helper
// name. packageOfSimple sees the local declaration and fails closed, so
// Report.error here is a local call, not the nl.tsym.tackbox.report capture -
// the gate is origin, not the class or method name.
class ReportLocalShadowDecoy {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            Report.error("boom", e, null, "area.key");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}

class Report {
    static void error(String msg, Throwable cause, Object tags, String key) {}
}
